name: ai-context-os-monorepo
description: AI Context OS — research + CLI framework

scripts.test:cli: node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs init --name demo --profile minimal --target /tmp/context-os-demo-test --force && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs validate --root /tmp/context-os-demo-test && node packages/cli/bin/context-os.mjs route "deploy to production" --root /tmp/context-os-demo-test
